use_cases: Submitting forms with primary or destructive actions
Triggering UI actions like modals, dropdowns, or sidebars
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Alternative actions with ghost or outline styling
ai_summary: A reusable button component with comprehensive variant and size options, built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Part of the shadcn/ui design system with Tailwind CSS styling, supporting default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants along with small, default, large, and icon sizes. Designed as an atomic building block for any React application needing accessible, themeable button interfaces.
